title: AiTutorFeedback
description: Structured output of the AI tutor marking a learner attempt against the module model answer and marking guide. Encodes the feedback format required by the marking guide and spoken-answer rubric.

band.description: Awarded band; written items use the marking-guide set, spoken items the rubric set.

strongest_moment.description: The single best part of the answer.

most_useful_fix.description: The one improvement that would most raise the mark.

missing_elements.description: FM elements the answer missed, from the marking-guide green flags.

weak_tag.description: Theme tag to route revision to.

cap_applied.description: Whether an automatic cap was applied (safety traded, bluffed, reputation-reliant, no decision).

better_answer.description: A model answer the learner can practise aloud.
